examples: The very words make many of us quail.
Just in front of you was a quail with its chicks.
On the other side of the rise, an endless impenetrable thicket of poison oak and coyote brush hides quail and other members of its guild.
He is the top player in a field that is weak by Quail Hollow standards.
But the brothers' success spawned legions of imitators, and the quail-egg market was saturated.
